title: Observing And Testing CX Agents | Interrupt 26
description_preview:
At Interrupt, the agent conference by LangChain, Carlos Pereira from Cisco's Customer Experience team showed how you close the loop between production feedback and code at 16 million customer interactions per year.

The core problem with scaling agents: once adoption climbs, feedback volume outpaces your team. Every thumbs down, every confused user, every low-confidence routing decision is a signal. If you treat it as noise, or if your team becomes the bottleneck processing it, adoption drops. T

title: Quickstart: LangSmith Fleet | LangChain Academy
description_preview:
LangSmith Fleet is the easiest way to build, deploy, and manage AI agents without writing a single line of code. Just chat.

Most teams struggle to adopt AI at scale: prompts are hard to write, automation tools have steep learning curves, and it's rarely clear which tasks can be reliably automated. Fleet solves all of this by creating true agents — not rigid workflows — that reason, adapt, delegate to sub-agents, and improve with feedback over time.

description_preview:

title: Codex for data science
description_preview:
